description: Per-skill publication classification + market-state attributes for the OSS marketplace surface. Seeded once from the 2026-05-18 priority doc; hand-edited going forward. Consumed by scripts/skill/build-skill-list.js to build the publicationQueue rendered to docs/marketplace-publication-queue.generated.md.

classifications.publishable: Generic / portable; recommended for jacob-balslev/skills publication.
classifications.sales-hub-bound: References internal schemas, Printify shop IDs, order_events, customer data, etc. Not publishable.
classifications.personal-infra: Specific to ~/Development monorepo orchestration; no audience outside this repo.

conflict_resolution.scope: The 53 ledger-vs-manifest conflicts flagged in marketplace-publication-queue.generated.md (ledger=sales-hub-bound vs queue "shared").
conflict_resolution.method: Read every conflicting SKILL.md frontmatter+body. All 53 have scope: operational|reference (NOT shared); 51 reference Sales Hub / Shopify / Stripe / customer; 2 are agent-orchestration personal-infra. The queue "shared" value reflects shared-tree LOCATION, not publishable scope — a false-positive comparison.
conflict_resolution.outcome: All 53 confirmed NON-publishable. The marketplace export gate already excludes them (scope: operational). They do NOT block the Tier-S publish set (which is disjoint from this list).
conflict_resolution.generator_note: The queue generator is scripts/skill/build-skill-list.js (workspace orchestration surface per ADR 0016). It reads this ledger plus the skill-audit run ledger and renders docs/marketplace-publication-queue.generated.md. Regenerate with `node scripts/skill/build-skill-list.js --write` after editing this ledger. (The prior dangling shim into the archived skill-audit-loop mirror was superseded by this generator; see ADR 0009.)
conflict_resolution.future_work: ~20-25 of the kept-excluded skills appear generic with only incidental Sales Hub examples (candidates for a deliberate port+sanitize -> publishable pass). This split was NOT automated here: a heuristic misclassified clear Sales Hub skills (receipts, kpi-cards, page-cro, gdpr-compliance), so each candidate needs a per-skill content review + actual sanitization before any reclassification to publishable. No skill was flipped toward publishable in this pass (privacy-safe direction).
